description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker:latest image with the docker:dind service and runs a before_script that logs in to the GitLab Container Registry via docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p ${CI_JOB_TOKEN} ${CI_REGISTRY}. Define DEPLOY_REGISTRY and DOCKER_DRIVER variables, and add three parallel matrix jobs: build_arm_none_eabi_gcc, build_clang, and build_gcc, each running in the default stage. In build_arm_none_eabi_gcc, use a matrix with VERSION 14 and execute docker build -t arm-none-eabi-gcc:${VERSION} --build-arg VERSION=${VERSION}.3.rel1 -f arm-none-eabi-gcc/Dockerfile . followed by build/publish_image.sh arm-none-eabi-gcc:${VERSION}. In build_clang, use a matrix with VERSION 21,20,19,18,17,16,14 and run docker build -t clang:${VERSION} --build-arg VERSION=${VERSION} -f clang/Dockerfile . then build/publish_image.sh clang:${VERSION}; in build_gcc, use a matrix with VERSION 15,14,13,12,11 and run docker build -t gcc:${VERSION} --build-arg VERSION=${VERSION} -f gcc/Dockerfile . then build/publish_image.sh gcc:${VERSION}.
